title: oenothera rosea var. lyrata
intro: Oenothera rosea var. lyrata, commonly known as the pink evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Oenothera rosea var. lyrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or tinctures made from the flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
